summary: Completed testing of Iteration 17 - DWZ Auto-Sync, Order History Timeline, and Batch WhatsApp Notifications. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all three new features: Sync DWZ button, Batch Notify modal, and Order History Timeline modal are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: DWZ Sync API correctly fetches tracking data from DWZ56 API and matches with orders in fulfillment_pipeline
Order History Timeline API correctly aggregates events from order_history collection and stage_dates
Batch Notify by Stage API correctly sends WhatsApp notifications to all orders in a specific stage
Frontend DWZSyncButton component shows sync results with toast notifications
Frontend BatchNotifyModal shows stage selector with order counts per stage
Frontend OrderHistoryModal displays timeline with icons, labels, and timestamps
All new endpoints properly handle both string and integer order IDs
DWZ sync logs are stored in dwz_sync_logs collection for audit trail
seed_data_creation: Used existing order #99001 in fulfillment_pipeline collection for tnvcollectionpk store. Order has 7 timeline events.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 features fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/dwz56-sync/sync (DWZ auto-sync), GET /api/dwz56-sync/order-history/{order_id} (order timeline), POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/notify-by-stage (batch notifications), GET /api/dwz56-sync/sync-logs (sync audit logs), POST /api/dwz56-sync/log-event (custom event logging). Frontend has three new components: DWZSyncButton (cyan 'Sync DWZ' button), BatchNotifyModal (emerald 'Batch Notify' button), OrderHistoryModal (blue History icon on order cards). All components work correctly. Order #99001 exists in tnvcollectionpk store with 7 timeline events for testing.

backend_apis.POST /api/dwz56-sync/sync: PASS - Fetches DWZ tracking and syncs to pipeline
backend_apis.GET /api/dwz56-sync/order-history/{order: PASS - Returns timeline with 7 events for order 99001
backend_apis.POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/notify-by: PASS - Sends batch notifications by stage
backend_apis.POST /api/dwz56-sync/log-event: PASS - Logs custom events to order history

frontend_ui.sync_dwz_button: PASS - Cyan button visible, triggers sync, shows toast with results
frontend_ui.batch_notify_modal: PASS - Emerald button opens modal with stage selector and send button
frontend_ui.order_history_modal: PASS - Blue History icon on order card opens timeline modal with 7 events

POST /api/dwz56-sync/sync.notes: Fetches from DWZ56 API, matches orders by dwz_tracking field

GET /api/dwz56-sync/order-history/{order.notes: Returns 7 timeline events for order 99001 including stage changes and order creation

POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/notify-by.notes: Sends WhatsApp notifications to all orders in specified stage

new_elements_verified: 'Sync DWZ' button (cyan outlined) - triggers DWZ sync and shows toast with results
'Batch Notify' button (emerald outlined) - opens BatchNotifyModal with stage selector
History icon button on order cards - opens OrderHistoryModal with timeline
OrderHistoryModal shows current status (stage, customer, tracking numbers) and timeline events
BatchNotifyModal shows stage dropdown with order counts and Send Notifications button
